creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text:
The port is at 3.2.0 and no build issues with default options against quarterly's 3.1.1 are known.  I would surely have received pkg-fallout@ mail.

Be sure this is not something local on your system.

I will now close this bug; you will need to provide FULL information including OS, other ports, Git hashes and thereabouts in order to reproduce the issue with a properly installed ports tree, especially with a recursive "make clean depends" if you want to reopen this.
